description: Line W WSS-priority seed=1 screening configs derived from A-Opt-W03-multi / A-Opt-05-wss-multi.
notes: Primary metrics: wall.wss_r2_wss / wall.wss_rmse_wss. Pressure is a guardrail with r2_p >= 0.90. Velocity metrics are diagnostics unless WSS and pressure both hold.

items.purpose: Increase WSS loss weight from 0.1 to 0.2 while keeping field target weights unchanged.
Reduce velocity supervision from 2 to 1 and use WSS loss weight 0.2 to test whether velocity supervision competes with WSS.
Relax pressure weight from 0.5 to 0.25 and use WSS loss weight 0.2.
Aggressive WSS-loss upper-bound probe with WSS loss weight 0.5.
Stage-2 fine-tuning from A-Opt-W03-multi seed1 checkpoint with lower lr and WSS loss weight 0.2.
